# T65 CPU Core

This directory contains a local import of the T65(b) 65xx-compatible VHDL CPU
core from the `mist-devel/T65` repository, which is a maintained mirror/fork of
Daniel Wallner's OpenCores T65 core.

Imported RTL files:

- `rtl/T65_Pack.vhd`
- `rtl/T65_ALU.vhd`
- `rtl/T65_MCode.vhd`
- `rtl/T65.vhd`

Sources:

- OpenCores T65 overview: https://opencores.org/projects/t65
- Mirror used for this import: https://github.com/mist-devel/T65

The source files carry a BSD-style permissive license header requiring retention
of the copyright notice, license conditions, and disclaimer. Keep the original
headers intact when editing or redistributing these files.
